rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall","type":"error"}],"devdoc":{"details":"This library provides reentrancy protection matching Balancer's ReentrancyGuardTransient. Uses EIP-1153 transient storage (TLOAD/TSTORE) which: - Is automatically cleared at the end of each transaction - Is cheaper than persistent storage - Requires post-Cancun EVM The slot is computed using the same algorithm as OpenZeppelin/Balancer: keccak256(abi.encode(uint256(keccak256(\"openzeppelin.storage.ReentrancyGuard\")) - 1)) & ~bytes32(uint256(0xff))","kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"REENTRANCY_GUARD_SLOT":{"details":"Transient storage slot for reentrancy guard flag.
